document_title: Aviation Investigation Final Report — Westwater, Utah — Accident Number WPR24FA083
notes: NTSB final report for the February 7, 2024 loss-of-control accident of a Hawker 900XP (N900VA) near Westwater, Utah during a post-maintenance stall test, both pilots fatally injured. Pressures clock-anchored event sequence (1037, 1044:00, 1046:33, 1046:37, 1046:47, 1047:44), elapsed-time computation between FDR clock events, probable cause vs contributing factor distinction, comparison to a prior similar event (CHI06IA127 on the same type certificate), pilot-table joins (medical exam, flight review, total hours), and joins between narrative text and the Findings table and the CAE Simulator Flight test results.
